list:texts.text: What does H stand for? It stands for the area of high pressure. What does L stand for? It stands for the area of low pressure. Where is the low pressure area on the Australian weather map? It is near Tasmania. Where are the high pressure areas on the weather map? They are south of Australia. How high is the barometric pressure near New Zealand? It is 1021 hectopascals. How low is the barometric pressure over the north of Australia? It is 1006 hectopascals. How many high pressure areas can you see on the weather map? I can see three Highs. How many low pressure areas can you see on the weather map? I can see five Lows.
